name: sanchei-nullius-compat-fixes
title: SANCHEI Nullius Compat Fixes
author: SANCHEI
description: A local compatibility bundle for the SANCHEI Nullius mod set. It fixes Entangled Belts research and missing unlocks, Loaders Modernized Nullius logistics unlocks and logistics-group placement, Linked Chest And Pipe Nullius research/recipes/runtime migration, WideChests logistic stack-size prototype errors, and Quality of Life Research science packs.
